properties.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignments a JOIN enrollments e ON a.course_id = e.course_id WHERE a.id = ? AND e.user_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment_submissions WHERE assignment_id = ? AND student_id = ?
INSERT INTO assignment_submissions ( assignment_id, student_id, content_title, submitted_at ) VALUES ( ?, ?, ?, NOW() )
UPDATE assignment_submissions SET content_title = ?, submitted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE assignment_id = ? AND student_id = ?
DELETE FROM assignment_submissions WHERE assignment_id = ? AND student_id = ?

SELECT a.id, a.course_id, a.title, a.description, a.deadline, CASE WHEN s.id IS NOT NULL THEN '제출완료' ELSE '미제출' END AS submission_status, s.content_title AS submission_content, s.submitted_at FROM assignments a JOIN enrollments e ON a.course_id = e.course_id LEFT JOIN assignment_submissions s ON a.id = s.assignment_id AND e.student_id = s.student_id WHERE e.student_id = ? ORDER BY a.deadline ASC
